location: On a corpse inside Volcano Cave, Mt. Gelmir — from the Ninth Mt. Gelmir Campsite Site of Grace, enter the large chamber ahead and take the right-hand (northwest) tunnel to its end, drop down onto a small ledge, then follow the tunnel into a room where the shield lies on a body.

source.name: Corpse guarded by demi-humans, Volcano Cave

tactics: Four demi-humans ambush around the corpse, two of them wielding heavy spiked clubs that hit hard — try to pull them into the connecting tunnel rather than fighting all four in the open room.
This is a Somber-upgrade weapon, so it cannot take a regular Ashes of War infusion, but it comes with its own Viper Bite skill for a poison burst attack.
Don't confuse the minor dungeon Volcano Cave with the much larger Volcano Manor legacy dungeon elsewhere in Mt. Gelmir — different location, different loot.
lore: A showy bronze shield made for gladiatorial combat, cast in the shape of a coiled, venomous snake — carrying it boosts the wielder's own resistance to poison.

builds.name: Poison proc off-hand
builds.why: The innate Viper Bite skill applies a heavy poison buildup on demand, giving a pure Strength build a way to inflict poison without needing a separate infused weapon.
